chunks.text: Next week, my family is going on a small trip.
But we do not know what to take or where to stay.
My brother thought for a moment.
I know how to pack things well,” he answered.
“ Where are we going to stay?
“ I have already decided on a small, quiet hotel,” he said.
“ Have you decided when to leave?
“ Yes, early on Saturday morning,” my father smiled.
I called Tom and asked him which book to take.
“ The book about mountains is a good one,” he suggested at once.
“ I do not know how to choose the gifts,” my sister sighed.
There are too many bags to pick from.
where to take pictures — planning is perhaps the most fun part of a trip.
